name: Poly Fire
short_description: Poly Fire is a tactical multiplayer team 1st person shooter. Using a variety of weapons and characters, you will battle with up to 32 players on Various maps . By managing your skills correctly, you will lead your team to victory.
detailed_description:
Poly Fire is a tactical multiplayer team 1st person shooter. Using a variety of weapons and characters, you will battle with up to 32 players on Various maps . By managing your skills correctly, you will lead your team to victory.

The game includes seven various maps

And three various game modes.

Team up with up to 16 players to fight in furious PvP matches.

Group up with your friends in the squad to bring the teamplay to another level.

It uses a server browser, so look for a game and join random people. or create a game for you and your friends for the private experience if you'd prefer.
